member.name: T:Lakona.Rpc.Core.IRemoteEndPointProvider
member.summary: Optional interface for transports that can report the remote endpoint of the connected peer. Implement on server-side transports where the remote address is known (TCP, UDP/KCP, WebSocket with HTTP context, etc.).

member.name: T:Lakona.Rpc.Core.IRpcClient
member.summary: Runtime-facing RPC client abstraction used by generated client proxies.
member.remarks: Application code normally uses the generated client facade instead of this interface directly. Implementations are responsible for request correlation, response decoding, and server notification dispatch.

member.name: M:Lakona.Rpc.Core.IRpcClient.CallAsync``2(Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcMethod{``0,``1},``0,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends one RPC request and waits for the matching response.
member.param: Generated method descriptor containing the service id and method id.
Request DTO instance, or for void-style requests.
Cancellation token for the outbound send and response wait.
member.exception: Thrown by the default runtime when the remote response status is not .

member.name: M:Lakona.Rpc.Core.IRpcClient.RegisterNotificationHandler``1(Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcNotificationMethod{``0},System.Func{``0,System.Threading.Tasks.ValueTask})
member.summary: Registers the handler for a server-to-client notification method.
member.param: Generated notification descriptor containing the service id and notification method id.
Handler invoked with the deserialized notification DTO.
member.exception: Thrown when a handler is already registered for the notification method.
member.remarks: The default runtime invokes handlers from its internal notification-processing loop. It does not marshal notifications to the Unity main thread.

member.name: T:Lakona.Rpc.Core.IRpcConnectionAcceptor
member.summary: Server-side transport acceptor that yields accepted RPC connections.
member.remarks: Concrete transports such as TCP, WebSocket, and KCP implement this interface. The server host owns the accept loop and creates one RpcSession per accepted connection.

member.name: P:Lakona.Rpc.Core.IRpcConnectionAcceptor.ListenAddress
member.summary: Human-readable listen address for logs and diagnostics.

member.name: M:Lakona.Rpc.Core.IRpcConnectionAcceptor.AcceptAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Waits for the next accepted connection.
member.param: Cancellation token for the accept operation.
member.returns: The accepted transport plus display and remote endpoint metadata.

member.name: T:Lakona.Rpc.Core.IRpcSerializer
member.summary: Serializer for RPC method payloads (arguments and return values). Envelope encoding is handled by .

member.name: M:Lakona.Rpc.Core.IRpcSerializer.SerializeFrame``1(``0)
member.summary: Serializes a DTO value into an owned transport frame.
member.returns: An owned frame containing the serialized payload. The caller disposes it.

member.name: M:Lakona.Rpc.Core.IRpcSerializer.Deserialize``1(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte})
member.summary: Deserializes a DTO value from payload bytes.

member.name: M:Lakona.Rpc.Core.IRpcSerializer.Deserialize``1(System.ReadOnlyMemory{System.Byte})
member.summary: Deserializes a DTO value from payload bytes.

member.name: T:Lakona.Rpc.Core.ITransport
member.summary: Transport boundary for RPC: sends and receives complete frames (one message). TCP/WS/KCP differences are hidden below this interface.

member.name: M:Lakona.Rpc.Core.ITransport.ConnectAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Prepares this transport for frame I/O.
member.remarks: Client transports use this call to actively connect to their remote endpoint. Accepted server transports use it to initialize per-connection state such as streams, schedulers, or framing over an already accepted connection. In-memory or already-open transports may implement it as an idempotent no-op.

member.name: M:Lakona.Rpc.Core.ITransport.SendFrameAsync(System.ReadOnlyMemory{System.Byte},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends one complete frame.
member.param: Frame bytes to send. The transport must not retain this memory after the call completes.
Cancellation token for the send operation.

member.name: M:Lakona.Rpc.Core.ITransport.ReceiveFrameAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Receives one complete frame.
member.param: Cancellation token for the receive operation.
member.returns: An owned frame. The caller disposes it after processing. An empty frame means the remote side closed the connection.

member.name: T:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcServiceAttribute
member.summary: Marks an interface as an RPC service. ServiceId must be stable across versions.

member.name: T:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcNotificationContractAttribute
member.summary: Marks an interface as the server-to-client notification contract for a specific RPC service.

member.name: T:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcMethodAttribute
member.summary: Marks an interface method as an RPC method. MethodId must be stable within a service. Lakona.Rpc source generation requires exactly one request DTO parameter and generates payload packing/unpacking for it.

member.name: T:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcNotificationAttribute
member.summary: Marks an interface method as a server-to-client notification. MethodId must be stable within a notification contract.

member.name: T:Lakona.Rpc.Core.LakonaRpcGenerateClientAttribute
member.summary: Marks the current assembly as the client assembly that should receive generated RPC client glue.

member.name: T:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcMethod`2
member.summary: Typed descriptor for a client-to-server RPC method.

member.name: M:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcMethod`2.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a method descriptor from stable protocol ids.

member.name: P:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcMethod`2.ServiceId
member.summary: Stable service id used on the wire.

member.name: P:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcMethod`2.MethodId
member.summary: Stable method id used on the wire.

member.name: T:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcNotificationMethod`1
member.summary: Typed descriptor for a server-to-client notification method.

member.name: M:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcNotificationMethod`1.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a notification descriptor from stable protocol ids.
member.param: Stable notification method id declared by .

member.name: P:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcNotificationMethod`1.ServiceId
member.summary: Stable service id used on the wire.

member.name: P:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcNotificationMethod`1.MethodId
member.summary: Stable notification method id used on the wire.

member.name: T:Lakona.Rpc.Core.LengthPrefix
member.summary: Network framing: uint32 length prefix (big-endian) + payload bytes. Matches Unity client's LengthPrefix for wire compatibility.

member.name: T:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcKeepAliveOptions
member.summary: Peer liveness probing for RPC transports. Only inbound traffic proves the remote peer is alive; outbound sends do not suppress probes.

member.name: P:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcKeepAliveOptions.Disabled
member.summary: Shared disabled keepalive configuration.

member.name: P:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcKeepAliveOptions.Enabled
member.summary: Enables keepalive probing.

member.name: P:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcKeepAliveOptions.Interval
member.summary: Maximum time without receiving any frame before a keepalive ping is sent.

member.name: P:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcKeepAliveOptions.Timeout
member.summary: Maximum time to wait for an inbound frame after a ping before disconnecting the session.

member.name: P:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcKeepAliveOptions.MeasureRtt
member.summary: Measures round-trip time from keepalive ping/pong timestamps when enabled.

member.name: T:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcEnvelopeCodec
member.summary: Encodes and decodes Lakona.Rpc wire envelopes.
member.remarks: The codec serializes only the transport envelope fields. RPC method payloads are opaque bytes produced by an .

member.name: F:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcEnvelopeCodec.MaxPayloadSize
member.summary: Maximum payload length accepted by envelope decoders.

member.name: M:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcEnvelopeCodec.PeekFrameType(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte})
member.summary: Reads the frame type byte from an encoded RPC envelope without decoding the full frame.
member.returns: The frame type stored in the first byte.

member.name: M:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcEnvelopeCodec.EncodeRequest(Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcRequestEnvelope)
member.summary: Encodes a request envelope into a transport frame.
member.param: Request metadata and serialized method payload.
member.returns: An owned transport frame containing the encoded request envelope.

member.name: M:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcEnvelopeCodec.DecodeRequest(Lakona.Rpc.Core.TransportFrame)
member.summary: Decodes a request envelope from a transport frame.
member.returns: A decoded request frame whose payload slice references .
member.exception: Thrown when the frame type or envelope length is invalid.

member.name: M:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcEnvelopeCodec.EncodeResponse(Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcResponseEnvelope)
member.summary: Encodes a response envelope into a transport frame.
member.param: Response metadata, status, serialized payload, and optional error message.
member.returns: An owned transport frame containing the encoded response envelope.

member.name: M:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcEnvelopeCodec.EncodeResponse(System.UInt32,Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcStatus,System.ReadOnlyMemory{System.Byte},System.String)
member.summary: Encodes response fields into a transport frame.
member.param: Identifier of the request being answered.
Serialized return payload or empty bytes for non-success responses.
Optional UTF-8 error text included with the response.
member.returns: An owned transport frame containing the encoded response envelope.

member.name: M:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcEnvelopeCodec.DecodeResponse(Lakona.Rpc.Core.TransportFrame)
member.summary: Decodes a response envelope from a transport frame.
member.returns: A decoded response frame whose payload slice references .
member.exception: Thrown when the frame type or envelope length is invalid.

member.name: M:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcEnvelopeCodec.EncodePush(Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcPushEnvelope)
member.summary: Encodes a server-to-client push envelope into a transport frame.
member.param: Push metadata and serialized method payload.
member.returns: An owned transport frame containing the encoded push envelope.

member.name: M:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcEnvelopeCodec.DecodePush(Lakona.Rpc.Core.TransportFrame)
member.summary: Decodes a server-to-client push envelope from a transport frame.
member.returns: A decoded push frame whose payload slice references .
member.exception: Thrown when the frame type or envelope length is invalid.

member.name: M:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcEnvelopeCodec.EncodeKeepAlivePing(Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcKeepAlivePingEnvelope)
member.summary: Encodes a keepalive ping envelope into a transport frame.
member.returns: An owned transport frame containing the encoded keepalive ping.

member.name: M:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcEnvelopeCodec.DecodeKeepAlivePing(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte})
member.summary: Decodes a keepalive ping envelope.
member.exception: Thrown when the frame type or envelope length is invalid.

member.name: M:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcEnvelopeCodec.EncodeKeepAlivePong(Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcKeepAlivePongEnvelope)
member.summary: Encodes a keepalive pong envelope into a transport frame.
member.returns: An owned transport frame containing the encoded keepalive pong.

member.name: M:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcEnvelopeCodec.DecodeKeepAlivePong(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte})
member.summary: Decodes a keepalive pong envelope.
member.exception: Thrown when the frame type or envelope length is invalid.

member.name: T:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcFrameType
member.summary: Identifies the kind of RPC envelope stored in a transport frame.

member.name: F:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcFrameType.Request
member.summary: A client-to-server RPC request.

member.name: F:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcFrameType.Response
member.summary: A server-to-client RPC response.

member.name: F:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcFrameType.Push
member.summary: A server-to-client push notification.

member.name: F:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcFrameType.KeepAlivePing
member.summary: A keepalive ping frame.

member.name: F:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcFrameType.KeepAlivePong
member.summary: A keepalive pong frame.

member.name: T:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcStatus
member.summary: Describes the framework-level outcome of an RPC response.

member.name: F:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcStatus.Ok
member.summary: The request completed successfully and the payload contains the serialized return value.

member.name: F:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcStatus.NotFound
member.summary: The target service or method was not found.

member.name: F:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcStatus.HandlerError
member.summary: The server handler failed or returned an invalid framework response.

member.name: F:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcStatus.Overloaded
member.summary: The server could not accept the request because it is overloaded.

member.name: F:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcStatus.BadRequest
member.summary: The request reached the RPC layer but was invalid for the target RPC contract.

member.name: F:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcStatus.ProtocolError
member.summary: The peer violated the RPC wire protocol or connection state machine.

member.name: T:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcRequestEnvelope
member.summary: Mutable request envelope used before encoding a client-to-server RPC request.

member.name: P:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcRequestEnvelope.RequestId
member.summary: Client-assigned request identifier used to correlate the response.

member.name: P:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcRequestEnvelope.ServiceId
member.summary: Generated numeric identifier for the target service.

member.name: P:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcRequestEnvelope.MethodId
member.summary: Generated numeric identifier for the target method.

member.name: P:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcRequestEnvelope.Payload
member.summary: Serialized method argument payload.

member.name: T:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcRequestFrame
member.summary: Decoded request envelope with an owned payload frame slice.

member.name: M:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcRequestFrame.#ctor(System.UInt32,System.Int32,System.Int32,Lakona.Rpc.Core.TransportFrame)
member.summary: Initializes a decoded request frame.
member.param: Generated numeric identifier for the target service.
Generated numeric identifier for the target method.

member.name: P:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcRequestFrame.RequestId
member.summary: Client-assigned request identifier used to correlate the response.

member.name: P:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcRequestFrame.ServiceId
member.summary: Generated numeric identifier for the target service.

member.name: P:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcRequestFrame.MethodId
member.summary: Generated numeric identifier for the target method.

member.name: P:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcRequestFrame.Payload
member.summary: Serialized method argument payload.

member.name: M:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcRequestFrame.Dispose
member.summary: Releases the underlying payload frame.

member.name: T:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcResponseEnvelope
member.summary: Mutable response envelope used before encoding a server-to-client RPC response.

member.name: P:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcResponseEnvelope.RequestId
member.summary: Identifier of the request being answered.

member.name: P:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcResponseEnvelope.Status
member.summary: Response status.

member.name: P:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcResponseEnvelope.Payload
member.summary: Serialized return payload.

member.name: P:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcResponseEnvelope.ErrorMessage
member.summary: Optional server error message associated with non-success responses.

member.name: T:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcResponseFrame
member.summary: Decoded response envelope with an owned payload frame slice.

member.name: M:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcResponseFrame.#ctor(System.UInt32,Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcStatus,Lakona.Rpc.Core.TransportFrame,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a decoded response frame.
member.param: Identifier of the request being answered.

member.name: P:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcResponseFrame.RequestId
member.summary: Identifier of the request being answered.

member.name: P:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcResponseFrame.Status
member.summary: Response status.

member.name: P:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcResponseFrame.Payload
member.summary: Serialized return payload.

member.name: P:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcResponseFrame.ErrorMessage
member.summary: Optional server error message associated with non-success responses.

member.name: M:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcResponseFrame.Dispose
member.summary: Releases the underlying payload frame.

member.name: T:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcPushEnvelope
member.summary: Mutable push envelope used before encoding a server-to-client notification.

member.name: P:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcPushEnvelope.ServiceId
member.summary: Generated numeric identifier for the target client service.

member.name: P:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcPushEnvelope.MethodId
member.summary: Generated numeric identifier for the target client method.

member.name: P:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcPushEnvelope.Payload
member.summary: Serialized push payload.

member.name: T:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcPushFrame
member.summary: Decoded push envelope with an owned payload frame slice.

member.name: M:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcPushFrame.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32,Lakona.Rpc.Core.TransportFrame)
member.summary: Initializes a decoded push frame.
member.param: Generated numeric identifier for the target client service.
Generated numeric identifier for the target client method.

member.name: P:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcPushFrame.ServiceId
member.summary: Generated numeric identifier for the target client service.

member.name: P:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcPushFrame.MethodId
member.summary: Generated numeric identifier for the target client method.

member.name: P:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcPushFrame.Payload
member.summary: Serialized push payload.

member.name: M:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcPushFrame.Dispose
member.summary: Releases the underlying payload frame.

member.name: T:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcKeepAlivePingEnvelope
member.summary: Keepalive ping envelope sent to measure liveness and optional round-trip time.

member.name: P:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcKeepAlivePingEnvelope.TimestampTicksUtc
member.summary: UTC timestamp ticks captured by the sender.

member.name: T:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcKeepAlivePongEnvelope
member.summary: Keepalive pong envelope sent in response to a keepalive ping.

member.name: P:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcKeepAlivePongEnvelope.TimestampTicksUtc
member.summary: UTC timestamp ticks copied from the matching ping.

member.name: T:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcVoid
member.summary: Singleton marker value used for RPC methods with no return payload.

member.name: F:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcVoid.Instance
member.summary: Shared void marker instance.

member.name: T:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcException
member.summary: Exception thrown when a remote RPC response reports a non-success status.

member.name: M:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcException.#ctor(Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcStatus,System.String,System.UInt32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates an exception from a remote RPC failure response.
member.param: Request id associated with the failed response.

member.name: P:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcException.Status
member.summary: Remote response status.

member.name: P:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcException.ErrorMessage
member.summary: Optional remote error message.

member.name: P:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcException.RequestId
member.summary: Request id associated with the failed response.

member.name: P:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcException.ServiceId
member.summary: Target service id.

member.name: P:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcException.MethodId
member.summary: Target method id.

member.name: T:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcNotificationHandlerExceptionContext
member.summary: Details for an exception thrown by a client-side notification handler.

member.name: T:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcUnhandledNotificationContext
member.summary: Details for a server-to-client notification frame that had no registered client-side handler.

member.name: T:Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcProtocolLimits
member.summary: Central defaults for RPC protocol payload, transport frame, and security transform limits.

member.name: T:Lakona.Rpc.Core.TransportSecurityConfig
member.summary: Frame transformation settings applied above a concrete transport.
member.remarks: This configuration controls optional compression and symmetric frame encryption performed by . It is not a TLS replacement and does not authenticate the remote peer by itself.

member.name: P:Lakona.Rpc.Core.TransportSecurityConfig.EnableCompression
member.summary: Compresses frames before encryption and transmission when enabled.

member.name: P:Lakona.Rpc.Core.TransportSecurityConfig.CompressionThresholdBytes
member.summary: Minimum frame size before compression is attempted.

member.name: P:Lakona.Rpc.Core.TransportSecurityConfig.MaxDecompressedFrameBytes
member.summary: Maximum allowed decompressed frame size.

member.name: P:Lakona.Rpc.Core.TransportSecurityConfig.EnableEncryption
member.summary: Encrypts transformed frames when enabled.

member.name: P:Lakona.Rpc.Core.TransportSecurityConfig.EncryptionKey
member.summary: Raw symmetric encryption key bytes.

member.name: P:Lakona.Rpc.Core.TransportSecurityConfig.EncryptionKeyBase64
member.summary: Base64-encoded symmetric encryption key. Used when is not set.

member.name: P:Lakona.Rpc.Core.TransportSecurityConfig.IsEnabled
member.summary: Indicates whether any frame transformation is enabled.

member.name: M:Lakona.Rpc.Core.TransportSecurityConfig.ResolveKey
member.summary: Resolves the configured encryption key.
member.exception: Thrown when is not valid base64.
